title: Schiedeella affinis
taxonomy: Schiedeella affinis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the genus Schiedeella. The species was discovered and described by the botanist Robert Louis Dressler. Schiedeella affinis is native to Central America and has been found in countries such as Costa Rica and Panama. The classification of Schiedeella affinis reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the larger orchid family.
